name: Outlaw
description: Whether by choice or necessity, you lived outside the law, learning to survive by wit and guile.

feats.name: Worth the Risk
feats.description: Only those that take risks are the ones who survive. When rolling with **Ambition** and would fail a **Skill Check**, you may reroll up to 2d6 to try and succeed. However if you still **fail** the check, you loss **Ambition** equal to the amount rolled on your **Ambition** die, this cannot be reduced.
